evals.description: Direct slash command invocation should trigger gh-review
evals.expected_behavior: Skill triggers: checks gh-pending.md for drafts, then either shows pending drafts or enters scan mode
Skill triggers and scans GitHub PRs/Issues for easyfan repos
Skill triggers and enters interactive mode

evals.description: Asking about pending comments triggers the skill
evals.user_message: 有没有新的 PR 评论？
evals.expected_behavior: Skill triggers and checks GH_PENDING and/or scans GitHub
Skill triggers in non-interactive mode: scan, write to GH_PENDING, run notify script, exit

evals.description: General GitHub question should NOT trigger gh-review
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT trigger — this is a general git question, not a review of easyfan repos

evals.description: GitHub activity for non-easyfan repos should NOT trigger
evals.user_message: 帮我看看 microsoft/vscode 最近有什么 PR
evals.expected_behavior: Skill does NOT trigger — gh-review is scoped to easyfan repos only
